en.ahmedali: Then you, the erring and the deniers,
en.ahmedraza: Then indeed you, the astray, the deniers –
en.arberry: Then you erring ones, you that cried lies,
en.daryabadi: Then verily ye, O ye erring, denying people.
en.hilali: "Then moreover, verily, you the erring-ones, the deniers (of Resurrection)!
en.itani: Then you, you misguided, who deny the truth.
en.maududi: Then you, the erring ones and those that gave the lie to the Truth,
en.mubarakpuri: "Then verily, --- you the erring -- ones, the deniers!"
en.pickthall: Then lo! ye, the erring, the deniers,
en.qaribullah: Then you went astray, you that belied,
en.sahih: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,
en.sarwar: Then you people who had gone astray and rejected the Truth
en.shakir: Then shall you, O you who err and call it a lie!
en.wahiduddin: Then you, you misguided ones, who deny the truth,
en.yusufali: "Then will ye truly,- O ye that go wrong, and treat (Truth) as Falsehood!-
fa.ansarian: آن گاه شما ای گمراهان انکار کننده!
fa.bahrampour: آن‌گاه شما اى گمراهان تكذيب كننده
fa.ghomshei: آن گاه شما ای گمراهان منکر (قیامت).
fa.khorramdel: سپس شما ای گمراهان تکذیب کننده (ی زندگی دوباره). [[«الْمُکَذِّبُونَ»: تکذیب کنندگان زنده شدن و حیات دوباره پیدا کردن.]]
fa.khorramshahi: سپس شمایان ای گمراهان دروغ انگار [و اهل انکار]
fa.mojtabavi: و آنگاه شما اى گمراهان دروغ‌انگار،
fa.sadeqi: سپس بی‌گمان شما ای گمراهان و تکذیب‌‌کنندگان!
